intro.text: Elara's head throbbed as she opened her eyes...
Where... where am I? This looks like someone's bedroom.
The last thing I remember was the vampires cornering me...
How did I escape? And who brought me here?
I should look around for clues.

dialogues.text: Elara opens the worn leather diary.
"Day 47: I saw her again today. The raven-haired beauty with sad eyes."
"She doesn't know I watch her from the shadows. I must protect her."
Elara's hands tremble. Someone has been watching her...
Inside hangs Victorian-style dresses, all in shades of black and deep crimson.
A faint scent of roses and... blood?
These clothes don't belong to any human.
Elara approaches the heavy oak door.
It's locked from the outside. She's trapped.
A note slides under the door: 'Stay here. You're safe. I'll return at dusk.'
